title: Restore 18 missing comic panels

requirements.text: Identify and fix the bug causing 18 panels to be incorrectly removed or filtered from the comic viewer display

quotes: nope find your bug and then re-add the removed 18 panels return them now

acceptanceCriteria: All 18 previously missing panels are now visible in the comic viewer
No panels are incorrectly filtered or hidden due to deduplication or other logic
Progressive rendering displays the complete story without missing content

requirements.text: Verify that all chapters in COMIC_DATA render their complete panel sets without any panels being inadvertently filtered out
acceptanceCriteria: Each chapter displays all its defined panels from comicData.ts
No logic in ComicViewer.tsx, deduplication.ts, or progressive rendering inadvertently removes panels
Total panel count matches the expected count from COMIC_DATA

requirements.text: Ensure the repetition removal feature only removes duplicate text content and never removes entire panels from the display
acceptanceCriteria: Repetition removal only affects text content within panels, not panel visibility
All 18 missing panels are restored regardless of repetition removal toggle state
Panel structure and layout remain intact when deduplication is enabled

constraints: Preserve all existing comic data in frontend/src/lib/comicData.ts
Keep deduplication feature functional for text content only
nonGoals: Adding new comic panels beyond restoring the 18 missing ones
Changing the comic story content or translations
Modifying the visual design or styling of panels
Altering narration or speech recognition features
